message:
feat(abi): promote setenv/unsetenv/putenv to fully native environ manipulation

Replace all 3 host delegations in stdlib_abi.rs with native implementations
that directly manipulate the HOST_ENVIRON array:

- native_setenv: scans environ for existing entry, replaces or appends
  with malloc'd "NAME=value" string. On first growth, copies the
  crt0-allocated environ to our own malloc'd array.
- native_unsetenv: scan and shift (already existed as remove_from_environ)
- native_putenv_impl: stores string directly in environ (no copy, per spec)
- Thread safety via std::sync::Mutex protecting all mutations
- ENVIRON_OWNED flag tracks whether we've taken ownership of the array

Removed dead code: native_setenv_sym/native_unsetenv_sym/native_putenv_sym
(link_name references to glibc versioned symbols that recursed under LD_PRELOAD).

Host delegation count in stdlib_abi.rs: 3 → 0

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
